content_preview: report: professional practice facultad de ingeniería y ciencias aplicadas, universidad de los andes nicolas ruiz ciencias de la computación empresas copec s. a. distribuidores de combustibles y lubricantes abstract this report describes the professional internship i completed at empresas copec, with

acquisitions like mapco express in the ee. uu, and expanding into south america, launched electric charging stations with “copec voltex” and digital services like app copec and copec empresas and more recently their digital wallet, copec pay. the main activities consist in energy and fuel, with dist

work detail 2.1.​ general activities during my internship i was asked to do several tasks with different areas and people. first i was tasked with the investigation of “gemini gems” and “notebook lm” to see which one was more adequate to help the process of event creation in “amplitude”, a user trac

interviews and surveys with the users made by the front end team that involved several meetings to refine the product in terms of ux/ui and future developments. this was also made with the remittances service, where several weekly meetings, checkpoints and refinement sessions were made about the fut

status state, where it has already been confirmed and settled and it's waiting for the money to arrive. for this, there is a constant polling process making queries to the provider, to check for the status. once it is completed, the polling for that transaction is stopped and it is no longer tracked

so when the process itself doesn't matter, it's all controlled by function outputs on “ok” or “nok” states. the first part of the challenge that is also involved with a coding decision made in copec is the use of infrastructure as code (iac) with aws. i had to study from documentation and the existi

service. the other service was in charge of identifying the state of the transaction that was received and comparing it with the state of it on the internal database, to identify these false positives. the architecture for this solution would be the following, where the orange maintained the same, t

immediately executes the status query again. after his suggestions with my boss we realized that the logic that processes the state received on the webhook, can be in the status delay service, therefore eliminating this service and the queue that connects it to the status service. the architecture a

following. for the last changes in the code itself, it was in cross code revision with peers and the assistant manager, where they let me know that they don't “overprotect” code, that it's better that it fails when something changes or is incorrect (by the provider message) instead of it being fully

highly capital-intensive business model. in sectors such as forestry and pulp production, large-scale industrial plants, vertically integrated forest assets, and global export operations significantly increase output per worker. in the energy division, extensive logistics networks, fuel terminals, a

future technological products. the application later evolved into the “app copec", expanding far beyond its initial payment functionality and becoming a key platform for customer loyalty and interaction. through the app, users can access personalized promotions, accumulate and redeem benefits throug

the user from having a bad experience and improving the settlement process of the payments, but with the different tested solution and the error encountered throughout the development of the solution, i was able to end up creating a much more powerful solution, that didn't make any changes to the pa

one of the tasks assigned to me was to explore and redefine the process for “amplitude” marks and event creations. the following diagram shows how this procedure was previously carried out. in the process of defining, i also committed some mistakes, but provided great value for the team. for the def

working place environment looks like and how to interact and be a part of it. i also learned how mistakes can be made and will be made, no solution is complete in the first try, and it's important to iterate. there is a need for these mistakes to make a more prolix solution, and you must learn from

the relevance of customers' data protection. there are processes in order to use the users data for any new project, product or solution. in the human and personal aspect, it also helps me grow immensely. the whole team of around 16 people is composed of very young people, where the older is around
